subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who holdest the remedy for every pain! Illness and disease are of two kinds: physical and spiritual. The ailments of the body [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دارنده درمان دردمندان علل و بیماری بر دو نوع جسمانی و روحانی درد تن را
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @spiritual transformation
